'''âw-n-r''' ('''wanara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magnetify|magnetify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magnetify|magnetify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-n-r
|-
! Lemma
| wanara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wanarithi|wanarithi]] || [[word:wanariji|wanariji]] || [[word:wanarishi|wanarishi]] || [[word:wanari|wanari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanaruthuth|wanaruthuth]] || [[word:wanarujuj|wanarujuj]] || [[word:wanarushush|wanarushush]] || [[word:wanar|wanar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanaruthu|wanaruthu]] || [[word:wanaruju|wanaruju]] || [[word:wanarushu|wanarushu]] || [[word:wanaru|wanaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanarufuth|wanarufuth]] || [[word:wanarufuj|wanarufuj]] || [[word:wanarufush|wanarufush]] || [[word:wanaruf|wanaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wanarethe|wanarethe]] || [[word:wanareje|wanareje]] || [[word:wanareshe|wanareshe]] || [[word:wanare|wanare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanarothoth|wanarothoth]] || [[word:wanarojoj|wanarojoj]] || [[word:wanaroshosh|wanaroshosh]] || [[word:wanar|wanar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanarotho|wanarotho]] || [[word:wanarojo|wanarojo]] || [[word:wanarosho|wanarosho]] || [[word:wanaro|wanaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanarofoth|wanarofoth]] || [[word:wanarofoj|wanarofoj]] || [[word:wanarofosh|wanarofosh]] || [[word:wanarof|wanarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wanarĂŠthĂŠ|wanarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wanarĂŠjĂŠ|wanarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wanarĂŠshĂŠ|wanarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wanarĂŠ|wanarĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanarathath|wanarathath]] || [[word:wanarajaj|wanarajaj]] || [[word:wanarashash|wanarashash]] || [[word:wanar|wanar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanaratha|wanaratha]] || [[word:wanaraja|wanaraja]] || [[word:wanarasha|wanarasha]] || [[word:wanara|wanara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanarafath|wanarafath]] || [[word:wanarafaj|wanarafaj]] || [[word:wanarafash|wanarafash]] || [[word:wanaraf|wanaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wanarasha|wanarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowanarasha|gowanarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwanarasha|gokiwanarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wanarnĂŒsha|wanarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowanarnknĂŒsha|gowanarnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwanarnĂŒsha|gokiwanarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wanarshĂ«sha|wanarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowanarnkshĂ«sha|gowanarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwanarshĂ«sha|gokiwanarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wanarosha|wanarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowanarnkrosha|gowanarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwanarosha|gokiwanarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wanarmusha|wanarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanarnkmusha|gowanarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanarmusha|gokiwanarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wanarsherasha|wanarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowanarnksherasha|gowanarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwanarsherasha|gokiwanarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wanarngasha|wanarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowanarnkngasha|gowanarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwanarngasha|gokiwanarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wanaryasha|wanaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowanarnkyasha|gowanarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwanaryasha|gokiwanaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wanaryamasha|wanaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowanarnkyamasha|gowanarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwanaryamasha|gokiwanaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wanarnĂŒshĂ«sha|wanarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowanarnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gowanarnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwanarnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiwanarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wanarnĂŒrosha|wanarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowanarnknĂŒrosha|gowanarnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwanarnĂŒrosha|gokiwanarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wanarnĂŒmusha|wanarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanarnknĂŒmusha|gowanarnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanarnĂŒmusha|gokiwanarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wanarshĂ«nĂŒsha|wanarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowanarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gowanarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwanarshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiwanarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wanarshĂ«rosha|wanarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowanarnkshĂ«rosha|gowanarnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwanarshĂ«rosha|gokiwanarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wanarshĂ«musha|wanarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanarnkshĂ«musha|gowanarnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanarshĂ«musha|gokiwanarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wanaronĂŒsha|wanaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowanarnkronĂŒsha|gowanarnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwanaronĂŒsha|gokiwanaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wanaroshĂ«sha|wanaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowanarnkroshĂ«sha|gowanarnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwanaroshĂ«sha|gokiwanaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wanaromusha|wanaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanarnkromusha|gowanarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwanaromusha|gokiwanaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wanarmunĂŒsha|wanarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowanarnkmunĂŒsha|gowanarnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwanarmunĂŒsha|gokiwanarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wanarmushĂ«sha|wanarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowanarnkmushĂ«sha|gowanarnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwanarmushĂ«sha|gokiwanarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wanarmurosha|wanarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowanarnkmurosha|gowanarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwanarmurosha|gokiwanarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wanar|wanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wĂŠnĂŠr|wĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howanar|howanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howĂŠnĂŠr|howĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowanar|hohowanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowĂŠnĂŠr|hohowĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒwanar|nĂŒwanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒwĂŠnĂŠr|nĂŒwĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwanar|nĂŒnĂŒwanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠnĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻwanar|nĂŻwanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻwĂŠnĂŠr|nĂŻwĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwanar|nĂŻnĂŻwanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠnĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwanar|luwanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwĂŠnĂŠr|luwĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwanar|luluwanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwĂŠnĂŠr|luluwĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwanar|liwanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwĂŠnĂŠr|liwĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwanar|liliwanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwĂŠnĂŠr|liliwĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowanar|kowanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowĂŠnĂŠr|kowĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowanar|kokowanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowĂŠnĂŠr|kokowĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewanar|kewanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewĂŠnĂŠr|kewĂŠnĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewanar|kekewanar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewĂŠnĂŠr|kekewĂŠnĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
